approved_command_preview:
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$script = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\New-DcoirAirtableDatabaseHealthExport.ps1'
& $script -ExportMode SchemaOnly -MetadataScope 'All' -ProbeUnsupportedMetadata -NoZip
$export = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $downloads -Directory -Filter 'dcoir_airtable_health_export_*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
$schemaFiles = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $export.FullName 'schema') -Filter 'table.*.schema.json'
$rows = foreach ($schemaFile in $schemaFiles) { $s = Get-Content -LiteralPath $schemaFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $name = [string]$s.name; $fields = @($s.fields); $fieldNames = @($fields | ForEach-Object { [string]$_.name }); $role = 'supporting_reference'; if ($name -in @('Governance Control Plane','Queue Control','Plans','Work Items','Session Checkpoints')) { $role = 'live_operational_authority' } elseif ($name -in @('DCOIR Cleanup WBS','DCOIR Cleanup Scaffold Registry')) { $role = 'plan_scaffold_authority' } elseif ($name -in @('Validation Evidence','Validation Test Cases','DCOIR Lifecycle Ledger')) { $role = 'validation_history_authority' } elseif ($name -in @('Operator Preferences','Operator Tools Registry','Local Configuration Registry','Admin Registry','Repo Surface Registry')) { $role = 'governance_registry_authority' } elseif ($name -like 'dcoir-*') { $role = 'helper_memory_authority' } elseif ($name -in @('Idea Inbox','Gemini Research Reference')) { $role = 'intake_reference_authority' }; [pscustomobject]@{ table_id=$s.id; table_name=$name; authority_role=$role; primary_field_id=$s.primaryFieldId; field_count=$fields.Count; linked_field_count=@($fields | Where-Object { $_.type -eq 'multipleRecordLinks' }).Count; has_status_field=($fieldNames -contains 'status' -or $fieldNames -contains 'Status'); has_retention_class=($fieldNames -contains 'retention_class'); has_review_after=($fieldNames -contains 'review_after') } }
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'wbs01_authority_map_20260505'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$rows | Sort-Object authority_role, table_name | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'table_authority_map.json') -Encoding UTF8
$md = @('# WBS01 table authority map','','Generated by chatgpt-exec from read-only Airtable schema export.','','| table | authority role | fields | linked fields | status | retention | review_after |','|---|---|---:|---:|---|---|---|') + ($rows | Sort-Object authority_role, table_name | ForEach-Object { '| ' + $_.table_name + ' | ' + $_.authority_role + ' | ' + $_.field_count + ' | ' + $_.linked_field_count + ' | ' + $_.has_status_field + ' | ' + $_.has_retention_class + ' | ' + $_.has_review_after + ' |' })
$md | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'table_authority_map.md') -Encoding UTF8
Write-Output ('Generated WBS01 authority map at ' + $outDir)
command:
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$script = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\New-DcoirAirtableDatabaseHealthExport.ps1'
& $script -ExportMode SchemaOnly -MetadataScope 'All' -ProbeUnsupportedMetadata -NoZip
$export = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $downloads -Directory -Filter 'dcoir_airtable_health_export_*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
$schemaFiles = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $export.FullName 'schema') -Filter 'table.*.schema.json'
$rows = foreach ($schemaFile in $schemaFiles) { $s = Get-Content -LiteralPath $schemaFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $name = [string]$s.name; $fields = @($s.fields); $fieldNames = @($fields | ForEach-Object { [string]$_.name }); $role = 'supporting_reference'; if ($name -in @('Governance Control Plane','Queue Control','Plans','Work Items','Session Checkpoints')) { $role = 'live_operational_authority' } elseif ($name -in @('DCOIR Cleanup WBS','DCOIR Cleanup Scaffold Registry')) { $role = 'plan_scaffold_authority' } elseif ($name -in @('Validation Evidence','Validation Test Cases','DCOIR Lifecycle Ledger')) { $role = 'validation_history_authority' } elseif ($name -in @('Operator Preferences','Operator Tools Registry','Local Configuration Registry','Admin Registry','Repo Surface Registry')) { $role = 'governance_registry_authority' } elseif ($name -like 'dcoir-*') { $role = 'helper_memory_authority' } elseif ($name -in @('Idea Inbox','Gemini Research Reference')) { $role = 'intake_reference_authority' }; [pscustomobject]@{ table_id=$s.id; table_name=$name; authority_role=$role; primary_field_id=$s.primaryFieldId; field_count=$fields.Count; linked_field_count=@($fields | Where-Object { $_.type -eq 'multipleRecordLinks' }).Count; has_status_field=($fieldNames -contains 'status' -or $fieldNames -contains 'Status'); has_retention_class=($fieldNames -contains 'retention_class'); has_review_after=($fieldNames -contains 'review_after') } }
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'wbs01_authority_map_20260505'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$rows | Sort-Object authority_role, table_name | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'table_authority_map.json') -Encoding UTF8
$md = @('# WBS01 table authority map','','Generated by chatgpt-exec from read-only Airtable schema export.','','| table | authority role | fields | linked fields | status | retention | review_after |','|---|---|---:|---:|---|---|---|') + ($rows | Sort-Object authority_role, table_name | ForEach-Object { '| ' + $_.table_name + ' | ' + $_.authority_role + ' | ' + $_.field_count + ' | ' + $_.linked_field_count + ' | ' + $_.has_status_field + ' | ' + $_.has_retention_class + ' | ' + $_.has_review_after + ' |' })
$md | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'table_authority_map.md') -Encoding UTF8
Write-Output ('Generated WBS01 authority map at ' + $outDir)
